nasb.text: He went in to Hagar, and she conceived; and when she saw that she had conceived, her mistress was despised in her sight.

esv.text: And he went in to Hagar, and she conceived. And when she saw that she had conceived, she looked with contempt on her mistress.

cnv.text: 亞伯蘭與夏甲親近，夏甲就懷了孕。夏甲見自己有了孕，就輕看她的主母。

ccb.text: 亚伯兰与夏甲同房，她就怀了孕。夏甲知道自己怀了孕，就轻视女主人撒莱。

csbs.text: 亚伯兰与夏甲同房，夏甲就怀了孕；她看到自己怀孕，就轻视她的主母。
